system.description:
Family Heirloom

The Whitecrown family schismed in the wake of the theft of the matriarch's signet ring over two centuries ago. They fell from being players in the intrigues around the throne to bickering over dwindling family holdings. Their wealth and influence is low, but not beyond recall.

If the ring resurfaced, elements of the feud might put aside their differences and reunite. Besides, legends suggest a ghost matriarch is bound to the ring, and she knows their secrets.
